action.reasoning: Observation: 60 epochs reached val AP=0.2496 (training APs near plateau). Analysis: Best AP rose throughout training but with cosine schedule it converged. To boost, I should train a larger/deeper model with more epochs. Decision: Submit current eval, then train a bigger model (num_layers=5, emb_dim=400, more epochs=80) — but first submit what we have to lock in 0.25.
